title: HubSpot Rate Limits - Single Source of Truth
description: Canonical rate limit values per HubSpot tier. All scripts MUST import from this file.

oauth_app.description: Public OAuth app (fixed rate, no daily limit per app)

notes.professionalAndEnterprise: Both Pro and Enterprise share 190 req/10s. Enterprise has higher daily limit.
notes.oauthApps: Public OAuth apps have a fixed 110 req/10s regardless of portal tier.
notes.searchEndpoints: Search endpoints have separate, lower limits. Use CRM exports for large datasets.
notes.batchEndpoints: Batch endpoints count as 1 request per batch call (up to 100 records per call).
